TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: James Anderson hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 3, James Anderson, squliq na p'unro. James Andersonhya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' pinqbaqan nya James Anderson t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk kawas tay 2007, mqwas biru sa Junction City pqwsan biru seneng. James Anderson, t'aring kawas tay 2007 tehuk kawas tay 2010, mqwas biru sa Oklahoma State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ames~…ē an*ers~…ēon ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *ames~…ē an*ers~…ēon, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. *ames~…ē an*ers~…ēonńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē pinqő≤aqan nja *ames~…ē an*ers~…ēon t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa *un ¶~ ®tion ¶~ ®itj pqws~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč. *ames~…ē an*ers~…ēon, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa oklańßoma s~…ētate pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: James Anderson hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 3, James Anderson, squliq na p'unro. James Andersonhya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' pinqbaqan nya James Anderson t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk kawas tay 2007, mqwas biru sa Junction City pqwsan biru seneng.
